name: Paul Gosar
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $116,561 for Paul Gosar in U.S. House, AZ-09. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
